title: leucanthemopsis pallida subsp. flaveola
intro: Leucanthemopsis pallida subsp. flaveola, also known as yellow mountain everlast, is a flowering plant species native to the mountainous regions of Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to improve digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of yellow mountain everlast typically involve drying and infusing the leaves and flowers to create teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
